title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 9–12, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The one that's got to stop....!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The one who should let it go is you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I just told you that your oppo- next...

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
